name: Achaekek's Kiss
description:
Access member of the Red Mantis assassins

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Kept as a closely guarded secret by the deadly members of the Red Mantis assassins, this poison is treated with reverence for its ability to end lives. If the victim dies while affected by this poison, its body decomposes to nothing in 1 minute, leaving only its gear behind. Non-magical preservation can't protect the tainted corpse. works on the poisoned body only if cast as a 5th-rank spell and the caster succeeds at a counteract check against the poison's saving throw DC when casting the spell. Even if cast successfully, peaceful rest only works as if it had been cast at 2nd rank.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Doomed 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage and Doomed 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage and Doomed 3 (1 round)
